siteConfig.name: Paul Crews Jr.
siteConfig.title: Head of Technology & Infrastructure
siteConfig.positioningStatement: Technical executive operating at the intersection of executive strategy and hands-on technical execution: owning risk, resilience, and long-term systems architecture.
siteConfig.strategicSummary: Build resilient systems. Align technology with business outcomes. Create infrastructure that scales.

experiences.title: Head of Technology & Infrastructure
experiences.summary: Own enterprise technology strategy supporting 1,500 users and 3,200 managed devices across multi-site operations. Manage $125K cross-departmental budget aligning infrastructure investments with institutional priorities.
impactBullets: Directed transition from Windows/Office 365 to MacOS and Google Chromebook infrastructure, reducing licensing costs by 30%
Upgraded legacy Server 2008 environment to cloud-based architecture achieving 99% uptime for data and identity services
Implemented MFA, Passkey authentication, and MDM governance profiles reducing device loss by 90%
Established storage retention policies decreasing cloud storage costs by 20%
Built AI-assisted Level 1 support system reducing ticket escalation and improving operational efficiency

experiences.title: Head of Technology (Interim)
experiences.summary: Restored operational stability across 4 locations supporting 2,500 users and 6,000 devices. Managed $50K quarterly modernization budget and reported directly to CEO on infrastructure strategy.
impactBullets: Contained active network intrusions and rebuilt security governance preventing lateral compromise
Secured VPN tunnels ensuring 100% operational access to CDK enterprise platform
Executed infrastructure migration from Windows Server 2012 to 2019 and transitioned to Google Workspace
Standardized endpoint lifecycle management and trained technical staff prior to deployment

experiences.title: Vice President, Information Technology
experiences.summary: Directed HIPAA and OMH compliant infrastructure development from ground up. Negotiated vendor pricing maximizing ROI within $50K annual budget.
impactBullets: Led full digitization of client records eliminating physical storage and saving tens of thousands annually
Reduced report retrieval time by 80% through cloud-based record architecture
Implemented automated scheduling and communication workflows improving operational efficiency
Architected secure intranet and public-facing web infrastructure

experiences.title: IT Manager
experiences.summary: Directed distributed team of 18 supporting enterprise infrastructure for 500 users and 4,000 devices. Owned disaster recovery and business continuity strategy implementing offsite redundancy and cloud restoration.
impactBullets: Contained ransomware intrusion prior to lateral propagation preventing network-wide compromise
Coordinated infrastructure strategy with Italian headquarters aligning regional operations with global standards
Architected secure VPN infrastructure enabling new office expansion

projects.name: MacOS & Chromebook Infrastructure Migration
projects.problem: Windows/Office 365 ecosystem incurred high licensing costs and limited flexibility.
projects.intervention: Directed full transition to MacOS and Google Chromebook infrastructure.
projects.architecture: Multi-site MDM governance with cloud-based identity and data services.
projects.outcome: Reduced licensing costs by 30% while achieving 99% uptime.
outcomeBullets: 99% uptime for data and identity services
90% reduction in device loss via MFA and MDM

projects.name: Network Intrusion Recovery & Security Governance
projects.problem: Active network intrusions threatened lateral compromise across 4 locations.
projects.intervention: Contained intrusions and rebuilt security governance from the ground up.
projects.architecture: Secured VPN tunnels, endpoint lifecycle management, Windows Server 2019 migration.
projects.outcome: 100% operational access restored; prevented lateral compromise.

projects.name: HIPAA-Compliant Cloud Record Digitization
projects.problem: Physical client records created storage costs and slow retrieval.
projects.intervention: Led full digitization of client records with HIPAA and OMH compliant architecture.
projects.architecture: Cloud-based record architecture with automated scheduling and secure web infrastructure.
projects.outcome: 80% faster report retrieval; tens of thousands in annual savings.

projects.name: Disaster Recovery & Ransomware Containment
projects.problem: Ransomware intrusion risk and lack of offsite redundancy.
projects.intervention: Contained ransomware prior to lateral propagation; implemented disaster recovery and business continuity strategy.
projects.architecture: Offsite redundancy, cloud restoration, secure VPN for office expansion.
projects.outcome: Prevented network-wide compromise; enabled scalable office expansion.
outcomeBullets: Secure VPN enabled new office expansion
